title: Streetwear 3D Character Fashion Drop AI
sourceTitle: Streetwear 3D Character Fashion Drop AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Polished full-body 3D streetwear fashion-drop render built around an original full-body anthropomorphic arctic fox character with soft white fur and confident expression, oversized coral hoodie, graphite cargo pants, cream chunky sneakers, reflective visor sunglasses, thin silver chain, and standing centered with one hand in pocket and one hand holding hoodie drawstring. Subject: an original full-body anthropomorphic arctic fox character with soft white fur and confident expression is the centered hero mascot-style character. oversized coral hoodie, graphite cargo pants, cream chunky sneakers, reflective visor sunglasses, thin silver chain defines the visible streetwear pieces while the fixed render remains full-body, clean, and fashion-editorial. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed centered full-body composition with confident fashion-drop posture, balanced negative space, clean floor contact, readable shoes, hands, accessories, and outfit details. Signature Elements: Minimal lime studio, confident hands-in-pocket or streetwear pose language, oversized fashion silhouette, chunky sneakers, reflective eyewear, clean 3D mascot personality, and premium fashion-drop polish. Style: Pixar-quality 3D stylized character rendering with polished fashion-editorial finish, high-end character design, smooth shadows, detailed fabric texture, rounded animated proportions, and 8K-level clarity. Color Palette: Fixed bright lime green studio backdrop with crisp modern streetwear contrast, glossy accessory highlights, clean sneaker neutrals, and controlled saturated accents from the outfit. Lighting: Soft studio lighting with smooth shadows, gentle rim definition on the silhouette, visible fabric texture, reflective sunglasses or accessories, and clean commercial character-render clarity. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Detailed hoodie cotton, cargo fabric, chunky sneaker rubber, reflective lens surfaces, metallic chain shine, and clean 3D fur or mascot surface detail according to the character. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
